name: talk-with-jamie-v2
description: Privacy-conscious personal AI chat with private context retrieval on Netlify

scripts.check:js: node --check app.js && node --check netlify/functions/_context.js && node --check netlify/functions/_persona.js && node --check netlify/functions/_lib.js && node --check netlify/functions/api.js && node --check tools/build-private-context.js
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run check:site && npm run test:unit
